sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْكَرَمُ جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoljubivost se smatra važnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered an important part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَزُورُ الضَّيْفُ مَنْزِلًا، يُقَدِّمُ لَهُ صَاحِبُ الْبَيْتِ الْقَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ.
sentences.translation: Kada gost posjeti dom, domaćin mu poslužuje kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: When a guest visits a home, the host offers them coffee and dates.

sentences.arabic: يُرَحِّبُ الْعَرَبُ بِالضُّيُوفِ بِحَرَارَةٍ وَيَهْتَمُّونَ بِرَاحَتِهِمْ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Arapi srdačno dočekuju goste i mnogo brinu o njihovoj udobnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs welcome guests warmly and care greatly for their comfort.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تَعْكِسُ قِيَمَ الْمَحَبَّةِ وَالتَّقْدِيرِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj odražava vrijednosti ljubavi i poštovanja među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom reflects the values of love and appreciation among people.
